messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "561a9115-d1f4-4538-ae44-7505c1f3f83c", "article_id": "093e6401-99d4-4177-9ace-30467fcd2377", "source_name": "i-D", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_launch", "brand": "Adidas", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Adidas offered a first look at the 26 new tops that will be worn exclusively during the competition", "The trefoil, the brand's recognizable logo turned fashion mainstay, will return to the kits for the first time since the 90s"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-17", "event_location": "Los Angeles, USA", "event_name": "THREE LANES", "brand": "Adidas"}}, {"event_frame_id": "605c35d3-eca8-498f-847c-442db3435f2d", "article_id": "4d2e3e6a-1ee9-42c5-8cda-ad2fe234b300", "source_name": "Highsnobiety", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_release", "brand": "adidas", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["adidas' Tokyo MJ \"Crystal Sky\" lands as a pale blue version of the Mary Jane-style sneaker", "The \"Crystal Sky\" iteration of the Mary Jane-style sneaker features a nice pale sky-blue color scheme, complemented by cloud-white accents. It's all dressed up in nice, stylish textures, including suede touches and leather strips"], "anchor_json": {"source_article_id": "4d2e3e6a-1ee9-42c5-8cda-ad2fe234b300", "source_name": "Highsnobiety", "published_at": "2026-03-08T19:51:01", "canonical_url": "https://www.highsnobiety.com/p/adidas-tokyo-mj-crystal-sky", "brand": "adidas"}}, {"event_frame_id": "991ba240-638f-4ef0-915c-64f4b5f46c50", "article_id": "093e6401-99d4-4177-9ace-30467fcd2377", "source_name": "i-D", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_event", "brand": "Adidas", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["a rave-meets-block-party aptly dubbed 'THREE LANES'", "live sets from Kaytranada and Baby Keem"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-17", "event_location": "Downtown Los Angeles, underpass near 101 freeway", "brand": "Adidas"}}, {"event_frame_id": "f0404f19-0afb-46d5-affa-e5537e16e511", "article_id": "093e6401-99d4-4177-9ace-30467fcd2377", "source_name": "i-D", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "collaboration", "brand": "Adidas", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["The Jamaican kit, which was developed in collaboration with the Bob Marley Foundation"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-17", "event_location": "Los Angeles, USA", "brand": "Adidas"}}]}
